title: To nullify the Henry Mountains and Fremont Gorge Travel Management Plan.
plain_summary: This bill cancels a government plan that was made in January 2025 about travel in two areas called the Henry Mountains and Fremont Gorge. The plan told people where they could and could not travel in these areas. Now the government cannot use this plan anymore and it has no power. The bill makes the travel plan completely useless.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Natural Resources.

sections.title: Section 1  Nullification of Henry Mountains and Fremont Gorge TMP
sections.text: The Secretary of the Interior cannot put into action, manage, or enforce a government decision called the Decision Record Henry Mountains and Fremont Gorge Travel Management Plan. This decision was published by the Bureau of Land Management in January twenty twenty-five. This decision record will have no power and cannot be used.
